mission.title: Install and Configure Fluent Bit (Fluentd) on Kubernetes
mission.description: Fluent Bit is a fast and lightweight telemetry agent designed to collect, process, and forward logs, metrics, and traces from any source to any destination. Installing Fluent Bit allows you to efficiently manage your observability data with minimal resource usage.

steps.title: Add the Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the Fluent Bit Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration.
```bash
helm repo add fluent https://fluent.github.io/helm-charts
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Fluent Bit
steps.description:
Install Fluent Bit using Helm, specifying the namespace and version.
```bash
helm install fluent-bit fluent/fluent-bit --namespace logging --create-namespace --version 0.56.0
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check that the Fluent Bit pods are running successfully.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace logging
```

steps.title: Configure resource limits
steps.description:
Update the Fluent Bit configuration to set resource limits for the deployment.
```bash
kubectl patch deployment fluent-bit --namespace logging --type='json' -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/resources", "value": {"limits": {"cpu": "100m", "memory": "128Mi"}, "requests": {"cpu": "50m", "memory": "64Mi"}}}]'
```

steps.title: Expose metrics for monitoring
steps.description:
Set up a service to expose Fluent Bit metrics for monitoring.
```bash
kubectl expose deployment fluent-bit --namespace logging --type=ClusterIP --name=fluent-bit-metrics --port=2020
```

uninstall.title: Remove the Helm release
uninstall.description:
Uninstall Fluent Bit from your cluster.
```bash
helm uninstall fluent-bit --namespace logging
```

uninstall.title: Clean up CRDs and resources
uninstall.description:
Remove any custom resources created by Fluent Bit.
```bash
kubectl delete crd fluentbit.fluentbit.io
```

uninstall.title: Delete the namespace
uninstall.description:
Remove the logging namespace if it's no longer needed.
```bash
kubectl delete namespace logging
```

upgrade.title: Backup current state
upgrade.description:
Export the current configuration and state of Fluent Bit.
```bash
kubectl get all --namespace logging -o yaml > fluent-bit-backup.yaml
```

upgrade.title: Update the Helm repository
upgrade.description:
Ensure your Helm repository is up to date.
```bash
helm repo update
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade Fluent Bit
upgrade.description:
Upgrade Fluent Bit to the latest version available in the Helm repository.
```bash
helm upgrade fluent-bit fluent/fluent-bit --namespace logging --version 0.56.0
```

upgrade.title: Verify the upgrade
upgrade.description:
Check that the Fluent Bit pods are running the new version successfully.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace logging
```

troubleshooting.title: Pods stuck in CrashLoopBackOff
troubleshooting.description:
This issue may occur if there is a misconfiguration in Fluent Bit. Check the logs of the pod for errors.
```bash
kubectl logs <pod-name> --namespace logging
```

troubleshooting.title: Metrics not exposed
troubleshooting.description:
If metrics are not accessible, ensure the service is correctly set up and the port is correct.
```bash
kubectl get svc --namespace logging
```

troubleshooting.title: High resource usage
troubleshooting.description:
If Fluent Bit is consuming too many resources, consider adjusting the resource limits in the deployment.
```bash
kubectl describe deployment fluent-bit --namespace logging
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Fluent Bit will have all pods running without errors, and you will be able to access the metrics service. Configuration changes can be applied as needed to optimize performance.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add fluent https://fluent.github.io/helm-charts
helm repo update

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have Helm and kubectl installed and configured to interact with your Kubernetes cluster.
